notes: v0.20.5 — NEWS strip overhaul + banner fix. The HOME NEWS / PATCH NOTES section now shows 6 patch-note cards in a 2x3 grid instead of 3 wide cards with ~90% empty space. Text sizes bumped across the board (version 16px, title 14px, bullets 13px, badge 11px). Each card has its own native ScrollContainer for the bullets — wheel-scrolls smoothly when content overflows. Featured hero banner's CTA pill (QUEUE MULTIPLAYER) moved from bottom-left to bottom-right so it stops overlapping the 'ENDS IN ...' countdown line; banner title font dropped 26 → 22 to fit the slimmer h=180 hero.
